rationale.fidelity: Preserves the offline deterministic facility-location model and correctly treats Benders cuts, bounds, and runtime as computational rather than business decisions.
rationale.managerial_framing: Provides a concrete planner, trigger, choices, stakes, computational trade-off, matched comparator, and planning-budget pathway.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly contribution or novelty claim is requested or asserted; the category is therefore not applicable.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels scalability as an inference and specifies the benchmark evidence and common-condition comparisons needed to support it.
rationale.prose_clarity: Highly structured and precise but more repetitive than necessary, with the same mapping restated in several sections.
rationale.overall: An excellent model-faithful computational framing with appropriately bounded scalability claims; only economy of presentation is weaker.
